Looking at this text, I can see it consists of two editorial prefaces (مقدمة الطبعة الثانية and مقدمة الطبعة الأولى) by the editor Muhammad Muhyi al-Din Abd al-Hamid for his edition of Ibn Aqil's commentary on Ibn Malik's Alfiyya. I'll classify each segment by scholarly function.
